results.rendered_html: N. of an ancient king of a particular district in India, (the Pāṇḍavas being obliged to live in concealment during the thirteenth year of their exile, journeyed to the court of this king and entered his service in various disguises),  MBh. ;  Hariv.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
virāṭa m.
1〉 N. pr. eines Fürsten der Matsya  BHAG. 1,4 . 17 .  MBH. 1,2717 . 3835 . 6988 . 2,1272 . 4,16 . 5,5100 .  HARIV. 8071 . 8098 .  KĀM. NĪTIS. 17,56 .  Spr. 2638 .  BHĀG. P. 1,10,9 . virāṭanagara  P. 6,2,89 , Schol.  MBH. 1,481 . 3,17436 . 4,1. fgg.  ˚parvan heisst das 4te Buch des  MBH. 
— 2〉 N. pr. einer Gegend  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR.   VARĀH. BṚH. S. 16,12 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 338,b,35 . 339,a,43 . b,44  (virāṭ gedr.).
— 3〉 ein Bein. Buddhaʼs  VYUTP. 2 .
— Vgl. vairāṭa, vairāṭyā.
